meaning: n.姐妹关系,姐妹之谊,妇女团体
examples: There was a degree of solidarity and sisterhood among the women.
So is Sweden the ultimate sisterhood heaven?
Parity, not sisterhood, is the name of the game.
Their nonscandalized sisterhood is clearly historic in sports and probably will not be repeated for generations.
Today the Sisterhood connects military girls through an online community and is expanding nationwide.
